message:
chore(audit): record deep exploration batch 406 (4 files, ~6.4K lines)

net/quic_native/streams.rs (1721L): SOUND — flow control, recv ranges
net/tcp/split.rs (1665L): SOUND — CombinedWaker, interest narrowing
runtime/reactor/epoll.rs (1518L): SOUND — stale fd handling
runtime/scheduler/worker.rs (1457L): SOUND — panic guard, backoff

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
